targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (uri, le) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{application="gitlab-analytics",uri!~"/actuator.*"}[2m]))) and sum by (uri) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="gitlab-analytics",uri!~"/actuator.*"}[2m])) > 0

100 * sum by (uri, method) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="gitlab-analytics",status=~"5..",uri!~"/actuator.*"}[5m])) / sum by (uri, method) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="gitlab-analytics",uri!~"/actuator.*"}[5m]))

panels.title: Top GitLab Endpoints by Latency p95

targets.expr: topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (uri, le) (rate(http_client_requests_seconds_bucket{application="gitlab-analytics"}[2m]))) and sum by (uri) (rate(http_client_requests_seconds_count{application="gitlab-analytics"}[2m])) > 0)

panels.title: Heap Pools — Eden / Survivor / Old Gen
